ELLORA

Elegant · Timeless · Yours

Wedding Planning

From intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations, we craft weddings that reflect your unique love story with elegance and flawless precision.

View Gallery

About This Service

Your dream wedding, designed to perfection

Your wedding day is the most significant celebration of your life — and it deserves to be flawless. At Ellora, we take every detail personally, from the first consultation to the final farewell dance.

We work closely with you to understand your vision, your story, and your style. Whether you dream of a grand palatial affair or an intimate garden ceremony, we design and execute every element with meticulous care.

From floral arrangements and stage design to catering coordination and guest management — our team handles it all so you can be fully present in every moment.

What's Included

Everything You Need, Nothing Left to Chance

Full-Service Planning

End-to-end coordination from engagement to reception, every detail handled by our expert team.

Floral & Decor Design

Custom floral arrangements and décor concepts designed to match your unique aesthetic.

Entertainment Curation

Live music, DJs, performers — curated to create the perfect atmosphere for every moment.

Vendor Management

We coordinate with all your vendors so you never have to chase a single call or email.

Our Work

Wedding Planning Portfolio

How It Works

Our Process

01

Initial Consultation

We meet to understand your vision, budget, guest count and dream aesthetic.

02

Concept & Design

We present a complete design concept including mood boards, floral palettes and layout plans.

03

Vendor Coordination

We source and manage every vendor — venues, caterers, photographers, florists and more.

04

Day-of Execution

Our team is on-site from setup to teardown, ensuring every moment is perfect.

Get in touch with our team and let's start crafting something extraordinary together.
